name: Apple Granola Bars
recipeIngredient: 1/4 tsp Ground allspice, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Coat an 8-inch square baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
In a large bowl, combine brown sugar and margarine; beat well.
Add applesauce and egg; blend well.
Lightly spoon flour into measuring cup; level off. Add flour, granola, baking soda, and allspice; blend well.
Stir in dried apples. Spread batter in prepared pan.
Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool completely; cut into bars.
